---
title: "Read results for ITS and COI"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## ITS

```{r}
# short = FALSE, keep_NA = FALSE
system("Rscript read_result_its.R FALSE FALSE")

# short = FALSE, keep_NA = TRUE
system("Rscript read_result_its.R FALSE TRUE")

# short = TRUE, keep_NA = FALSE
system("Rscript read_result_its.R TRUE FALSE")

# short = TRUE, keep_NA = TRUE
system("Rscript read_result_its.R TRUE TRUE")
```

## COI

```{R}

# short = FALSE, keep_NA = FALSE, datatype = nt
system("Rscript read_result_coi.R FALSE FALSE nt")

# short = FALSE, keep_NA = TRUE, datatype = nt
system("Rscript read_result_coi.R FALSE TRUE nt")

# short = TRUE, keep_NA = FALSE, datatype = nt
system("Rscript read_result_coi.R TRUE FALSE nt")

# short = TRUE, keep_NA = TRUE, datatype = nt
system("Rscript read_result_coi.R TRUE TRUE nt")

# short = FALSE, keep_NA = FALSE, datatype = aa
system("Rscript read_result_coi.R FALSE FALSE aa")

# short = FALSE, keep_NA = TRUE, datatype = aa
system("Rscript read_result_coi.R FALSE TRUE aa")
```
